iTransactionNo.description: The transaction identifier for the shipment data of the tracking event.

servprovAliasQualGid.description: The service provider alias qualifier identifier for the tracking event.

servprovAliasValue.description: The service provider alias value for the qualifier defined.

description.description: A description for the tracking event captured.

statusLevel.description: A status level associated with the tracking event.

vesselCodeQualifier.description: The vessel code qualifier identifier defined to itemize vessel codes.

vesselCode.description: The vessel code associated with the qualifier defined.

countryCode3Gid.description: The 3 digit country code that the vessel is registered in.

shipOrSailDate.description: The ship sail date for the vessel used in the tracking event.

dischargeOrCompletionDate.description: The discharge or completion date for the vessel used in the tracking event.

fightOrVoyageNum.description: The flight number if the tracking event is for a air mode or the voyage number if for ocean mode.

weightValue.description: A total weight value associated with the shipment tracking event.

volumeValue.description: A total volume value associated with the shipment tracking event.

obRefnumQualGid.description: The order base reference qualifier for the order level data of the tracking event. Define by order base, order release, or order release line.

obRefnumValue.description: The order base reference level value for the defined qualifier.

statusCodeGid.description: The status code GID associated with the tracking event.

timeZoneGid.description: The time zone GID for the tracking event date.

statusReasonCodeGid.description: The status reason code that is mapped to the tracking event.

ssContactFunctionCode.description: The contact function code for the individual entering the tracking event.

ssContactName.description: The contact name for the individual entering the tracking event.

trainJctBoCode.description: Shipment tracking event data for rail shipments. The train junction box code for the CLM message.

responsiblePartyGid.description: The responsible party that is defined for the type of status for the tracking event.

railRoadReportingScac.description: The SCAC for the rail road service provider that is providing the shipment status message or CLM.

isCarLoaded.description: The CLM field to indicate whether the rail car is loaded or empty.

carDestinationCity.description: Shipment tracking event data for rail shipments. Defines the rail car destination city.

carDestinationState.description: Shipment tracking event data for rail shipments. Defines the rail car destination state.

carDestinationSplcCode.description: Shipment tracking event data for rail shipments. Defines the rail car destination state.

carDestinationEtaDate.description: Shipment tracking event data for rail shipments. Defines the estimated time of arrival to the car destination node.

origTransactionNo.description: If this event is to adjust a previous tracking event, this field specifies the original transaction identifier.

temperature.description: The temperature associated with the shipment tracking event.

eventReceivedDate.description: The time stamp for when the tracking event was received.

driverGid.description: The driver GID associated with the tracking event.

eventEndDate.description: The event end date associated with the tracking event.

powerUnitGid.description: The power unit GID associated with the tracking event.

shipmentGid.description: The shipment GID associated with the tracking event.

driverRefnumQualGid.description: The reference number qualifier for the driver that can be used to associate to a tracking event.

driverRefnumValue.description: The driver reference number value for the reference number qualifier defined.

puRefnumQualGid.description: The reference number qualifier for the power unit that can be used to associate to a tracking event.

puRefnumValue.description: The power unit reference number value for the reference number qualifier defined.

relatedTransactionNo.description: If this event is related to another tracking event this field specifies the related transaction number.

externalEventReference.description: The reference number of the event used by the external system sending the event.

externalDataSource.description: The identifying code for the external system data source.

timeWorked.description: The time worked for the tracking event for recording purposes.

timeDriven.description: The time driven for the tracking event for recording purposes.

driverCalEventGid.description: This is a GID for the driver calendar event being recorded with the tracking event, such as vacation time.

domainName.description: Database domain where this data is stored.

orderBaseGid.description: The order base identifier for the order level data of the tracking event.  Define by order base, order release, or order release line.

orderReleaseGid.description: The order release identifier for the order level data of the tracking event. Define by order base, order release, or order release line.

orRefnumQualGid.description: The order release reference qualifier for the order level data of the tracking event. Define by order base, order release, or order release line.

orRefnumValue.description: The order release reference number value for the defined qualifier.

trackingNumber.description: The specific tracking number for the shipment provided by the service provider and is matched to a reference qualifier called tracking number.

carDestinationLocationGid.description: Shipment tracking event data for rail shipments. Defines the rail car destination location GID.

carDestinationCountry.description: Shipment tracking event data for rail shipments. Defines the rail car destination country.

erpc.description: Shipment tracking event data for rail shipments. ERPC is a system for abbreviating rail location names.

filingResponseType.description: The filing response type for Automated Export System (AES) via integration as tracking events.

shipGroupGid.description: The shipment group GID associated with the tracking event.

shipGroupTypeGid.description: The shipment group type (such as import, export, cargo manifest) for the shipment group associated with the tracking event.

orderReleaseLineGid.description: The order release line for the order level data of the tracking event. Define by order base, order release, or order release line.

orlRefnumValue.description: The order release line reference number value for the defined qualifier.

orLineRefnumQualGid.description: The order release line reference qualifier for the order level data of the tracking event. Define by order base, order release, or order release line.

indicator.description: A indicator that can be set to flag tracking event status.

carRepairHours.description: Shipment tracking event data for rail shipments. Defines the rail car repair hours.

carInterchangeEtiDate.description: Shipment tracking event data for rail shipments. Defines the rail car interchange date.

nextJunctionSplc.description: Shipment tracking event data for rail shipments. This field specifies the interchange junction code. ETA for this junction will be Interchange ETI Date.

locationGid.description: This field describes the location at which the event occurs.

equipmentInitial.description: The column defines the equipment initial for the equipment for which the event occurs.

equipmentNumber.description: The column defines the equipment number for the equipment for which the event occurs.

carDestTimeZoneGid.description: The time zone GID for the car destination Estimated Time of Arrival date.

carInterchangeTimeZoneGid.description: The time zone GID for the car interchange Estimated Time of Interchange date.

shipmentStatusType.description: Used for the ease of identification of the type of event. For example, this can be used to specify if the tracking is for matching with shipment, shipment group, order, etc.

iRecNo.description: The record number primary key identifier for the tracking event specified.

shipmentRefnumQualGid.description: The shipment reference number qualifier identifier.

shipmentRefnumValue.description: The shipment reference number value for the qualifier defined.

domainName.description: Database domain where this data is stored.

iRecNo.description: The record number primary key identifier for the tracking event specified.

stopSequence.description: The stop sequence associated with the stop if a shipment identifier is entered and stop tracking event is for an existing stop.

portLocationFunctionCode.description: The port location function code for ocean tracking events.

locationRefnumQualGid.description: The location reference number quantifier associated with a location reference number if supplied on the tracking event.

locationIdValue.description: The location reference value associated with the reference number qualifier.

locationName.description: A location name if supplied with the tracking event.

eventCity.description: The city associated with the tracking event.

eventState.description: The state associated with the tracking event.

eventCountry.description: The country associated with the tracking event.

splcCode.description: If the tracking stop is for a rail location the Standard Point Location Code (SPLC) can be used.

latitude.description: A latitude and longitude value for a stop level tracking event can be supplied instead of a location based event.

longitude.description: A latitude and longitude value for a stop level tracking event can be supplied instead of a location based event.

terminalName.description: The terminal name for port associated with the tracking event status.

gatePierDoorNumber.description: The gate pier door number assigned to the shipment tracking status.

timeZoneGid.description: The time zone identifier for the tracking event.

aeiIndicator.description: The AEI indicator for the tracking event.

referencePosition.description: The position of this stop relative to the yet-to-be-created new stop.

stopType.description: The stop type for the new stop created with tracking event.

locationGid.description: Typically a location GID is not supplied on a stop tracking event if you have entered the stop sequence number. If adding an additional stop to the shipment, this field together with the reference position is required.

domainName.description: Database domain where this data is stored.

erpc.description: If the tracking stop is for a rail location the Eastern Railroad President's Conference (ERPC) can be used.

iRecNo.description: The record number primary key identifier for the tracking event specified.

sEquipmentGid.description: The shipment equipment GID linking an equipment record to the shipment.

equipmentInitial.description: The equipment initial is a mark that is registered with national or international authorities that is associated with a specific owner.

equipmentInitialNumber.description: The Equipment Initial Number field is a concatenation of equipment initial and equipment number.

equipmentTypeGid.description: An equipment type is a category of equipment. Oracle Transportation Management uses equipment types when it determines equipment capacity.

intermodalEquipmentLength.description: The reported length of the equipment in the tracking event.

tareWeight.description: The tare weight recorded on the tracking event for the shipment equipment.

scaleName.description: The received volume recorded on the tracking event for the shipment ship unit.

scaleLocation.description: The scale location recorded for the tracking event.

scaleTicket.description: Sequence ID printed on the scale ticket when weight is recorded.

scaleWeight.description: The scale weight recorded on the tracking event for the shipment equipment.

weightQualifier.description: The type of weight that is represented by the scale weight; Estimate, Net, or Gross weight. E = Estimated, G = Gross, N = Net

equipmentGid.description: The equipment GID if the equipment is an asset managed in OTM.

equipmentRefnumQualGid.description: The equipment reference number qualifier to identify an equipment entity for a tracking event.

equipmentRefnumValue.description: The equipment reference value associated with the equipment reference number qualifier.

chassisInitial.description: The chassis initial is a mark that is registered with national or international authorities that is associated with a specific owner

chassisNumber.description: Number identifying the used in conjunction with the equipment on the tracking event.

chassisInitialNumber.description: The Chassis Initial Number field is a concatenation of chassis initial and chassis number.

domainName.description: Database domain where this data is stored.

sEquipmentIndex.description: The standing order of the equipment on the shipment

aarCarType.description: The AAR car type associated with the rail equipment on the tracking event.

sealSequence.description: The seal sequence number that refers to the compartment that is being sealed.

sealNumber.description: The seal number that identifies the seal tag.

domainName.description: Database domain where this data is stored.

iRecNo.description: The record number primary key identifier for the tracking event specified.

remarkSequence.description: A remark sequence number if entering multiple remarks for a shipment tracking event.

remarkText.description: The shipment remark text value for the qualifier defined.

domainName.description: Database domain where this data is stored.

iRecNo.description: The record number primary key identifier for the tracking event specified.

specialServiceGid.description: The special service identifier that is being reported against with the tracking event being reported.

serviceDuration.description: The time duration that occurred for the special service on the tracking event.

serviceTime.description: The time for the special service activity on the tracking event.

weight.description: The weight for the special service activity recorded on the tracking event for the shipment.

volume.description: The volume for the special service activity recorded on the tracking event for the shipment.

distance.description: The distance for the special service activity recorded on the tracking event for the shipment.

itemCount.description: The item piece count for the special service activity recorded on the tracking event for the shipment.

shipUnitCount.description: The ship unit count for the special service activity recorded on the tracking event for the shipment.

serviceCompletionState.description: An indication if the special service activity was completed with the tracking event.

remarkText.description: The shipment remark text value for the qualifier defined.

hosRuleGid.description: The hours of service rule GID for the given tracking event.

activityTime.description: The activity time associated with the hours of service reported for the tracking event.

ruleBeginTime.description: The begin time defined for the hours of service rule.

activityTimeRemain.description: The activity time remaining against that hours of service.

pks.description: Object primary keys that supports one or more multi-part (compound) keys

q.description: Filter (a 'where'clause) to restrict the items returned in the collection. By default, no filtering is applied.

expand.name: expand
expand.description: Comma-delimited string of child resource names that you want to expand so that the contents return with the parent in the same GET request.

limit.name: limit
limit.description: Positive integer value that specifies the maximum number of items returned by the server.

offset.name: offset
offset.description: Non-negative integer values that specifies the index of the first item to be returned. The offset index begins at 0. By default, the offset is 0, which returns all items starting from the first item in the collection.

orderBy.name: orderBy
orderBy.description: Comma-separated string of field names, each optionally followed by asc or desc, that specifies the order of items returned in the response payload.

fields.name: fields
fields.description: Comma-delimited string of field names that you wanted returned in a GET request.

totalResults.name: totalResults
totalResults.description: Boolean value that specifies whether to calculate the totalResults property. By default, this value is set to false indicating that totalResults is not calculated.

q.name: q
q.description: Filter (a 'where'clause) to restrict the items returned in the collection. By default, no filtering is applied.

asyncHeader.name: Prefer
asyncHeader.description: An optional header parameter that allows you to process the request asynchronously. Set the request header "Prefer" to "respond-async" for asynchronous processing. For synchronous processing, leave the parameter blank or do not define it.

transientHeader.name: Prefer Transient Header
transientHeader.description: A header parameter that allows you to execute queries. Set the request header "Prefer" to "transient" to explicitly declare that the query should be executed.
